name: XP Infra Fund II Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Infraestrutura
summary: XP Infra Fund II Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Infraestrutura is an investment fund focused on participating in infrastructure projects. The fund invests in equity stakes in infrastructure companies, aiming to generate returns through the growth and development of these projects. It supports a range of infrastructure sectors, contributing to the expansion and improvement of Brazil's infrastructure.
